evals.prompt: Set up SEO for my Next.js App Router project from scratch
evals.expected_output: Creates metadataBase in root layout, robots.ts, sitemap.ts, installs schema-dts, and configures title template
expectations: Sets metadataBase with NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL env var in root layout
Creates app/sitemap.ts with static and dynamic page patterns
Configures title template in root layout metadata
Adds default description to root layout
